# BaseCode Health — LLM Context File
# https://basecodehealth.com

> BaseCode Health builds clinical-grade Adaptobiotics™ and targeted biological stacks — supplements engineered to bridge the gap between your biological baseline and the demands of the modern Western environment.

## Company
- Name: BaseCode Health
- Founded: 2025
- Location: Toronto, ON, Canada
- Founder: Gurkamal Dhahan
- Website: https://basecodehealth.com
- Contact: hello@basecodehealth.com
- Category: Adaptobiotics™ (brand-coined)

## The Problem: The Biological Tax
The Western diet, chronic environmental stress, and modern work-life demands inflict a "Biological Tax" on every system in the human body. Human biology was not built for ultra-processed food, sedentary routines, chronic cortisol exposure, and environmental toxin loads. The result: gut dysfunction, brain fog, metabolic disruption, hormonal imbalance, and systemic inflammation.

## The Solution: Adaptobiotics™
BaseCode creates clinical-grade supplements designed for systemic adaptation. Each protocol targets a specific axis of environmental mismatch — restoring foundational bacterial populations, down-regulating cortisol, supporting metabolic processing, and reinforcing immune defense.

## Product Line: The Protocol Suite

### BaseCode Origin (Hero SKU)
- Category: Foundational Adaptobiotic (Synbiotic)
- CFU: 40 Billion
- Strains: 4 (L. acidophilus, B. lactis, L. plantarum, L. paracasei)
- Delivery: MAKTREK Bi-Pass Technology (marine polysaccharide acid-protection)
- Prebiotic: FOS (fructooligosaccharide)
- Capsules: 60 veggie capsules (HPMC, no gelatin)
- Supply: 30-day (2 capsules/day)
- Price: $34/mo (subscribe, 15% off) or $40 one-time
- Made in USA, cGMP certified, vegan

### BaseCode Ember (Metabolic Adaptation)
- Category: Berberine Phytosome complex for Western dietary processing
- Target: Metabolic disruption from ultra-processed food exposure

### BaseCode Deep (Cortisol Down-Regulation)
- Category: Magnesium L-Threonate + sleep protocol
- Target: Chronic cortisol elevation and circadian disruption

### BaseCode Synthesis (Cellular Energy)
- Category: Creatine monohydrate for cognitive and cellular output
- Target: Brain fog, energy depletion, cognitive decline under stress

### BaseCode Shield (Environmental Defense)
- Category: D3 + K2 immune protocol
- Target: Immune suppression from environmental toxin load

## Biology Stacks (Curated Protocols)
- The Restoration Stack: Origin + Deep (gut + sleep reset)
- The Performance Stack: Origin + Synthesis + Ember (gut + brain + metabolism)
- The Defense Stack: Origin + Shield (gut + immune fortification)

## Key Research
- HELIUS Study (Gut, 2019): Biology is the strongest predictor of gut microbiome composition — more than diet, age, sex, or lifestyle (2,084 subjects, 6 ethnic groups)
- Vangay et al. (Cell, 2018): Environmental shifts cause foundational microbiome disruption within a single generation
- Sonnenburg & Sonnenburg (Nature, 2019): Ultra-processed Western diets drive systematic extinction of beneficial gut bacteria
- McEwen (NEJM, 1998): Chronic stress allostatic load — biological cost of sustained environmental demands
- Govender et al.: Probiotic survivability data supporting acid-protection delivery

## Brand Positioning
- Tagline: "Your biology is paying a tax you never agreed to."
- Category: Adaptobiotics™ — clinical-grade supplements for environmental adaptation
- Tone: Clinical, architectural, authoritative
- Key vocabulary: Down-regulate, systemic adaptation, biological baseline, protocol, environmental mismatch, synthesis, epigenetic
